expected_outcome: Competent MySQL database designer skilled in installing/configuring servers, writing stored procedures, optimizing queries, and managing user roles permissions.

phases.practice_schedule: 1 Hour daily interacting with local databases and creating tables.

mini_project.title: Contact Directory Database
mini_project.description: Create a database collection for user addresses with automatic registration timestamps and status checks.

phases.milestone: Mastered MySQL server settings, Workbench operations, engine selection, and auto increment fields.

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily writing transaction commits and creating dynamic database views.

mini_project.title: Bank Transfer Transaction Script
mini_project.description: Write a transaction workflow that deducts balances from one account, updates recipients, and rollbacks on errors.

phases.milestone: Proficient in database transaction management, isolation configurations, and compiling database views.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing triggers, procedures, and backup schedules.

mini_project.title: Stock Alert Trigger System
mini_project.description: Establish a stock management system that automatically fires triggers to log alerts when item quantities drop below thresholds.

phases.milestone: Capable of automating workflows via triggers, locking databases down via users permissions, and export database files.

major_projects.title: Online Billing Database Architecture
major_projects.description: Develop a multi-table database mapping bills, transactions logs, user audits triggers, stored invoicing procedures, and database users permissions configurations.
